name: MobileGlues-release
desc: MobileGlues, which stands for "(on) Mobile, GL uses ES", is a GL implementation running on top of host OpenGL ES 3.2, with running Minecraft Java Edition in mi…
descFull: MobileGlues, which stands for "(on) Mobile, GL uses ES", is a GL implementation running on top of host OpenGL ES 3.2, with running Minecraft Java Edition in mind.
